headline: 3 Reasons We Love Jack Henry (JKHY)
summary: Jack Henry has been treading water for the past six months, recording a small return of 3.5% while holding steady at $154.13. However, the stock is beating the S&P 500’s 3.2% decline during that period.

headline: Jack Henry & Associates (JKHY) Surged on Strong Results and Improved Guidance
summary: Baron Capital, an investment management company, released its “Baron Financials ETF” fourth-quarter 2025 investor letter. A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. In the fourth quarter, the Fund fell 2.22% (Institutional Shares) compared to a 7.19% decline for the FactSet Global FinTech Index (Benchmark) and a 2.07% gain for the MSCI USA Financials […]

headline: Jack Henry & Associates: Quality Remains, But Growth Is Slowing
summary: Jack Henry & Associates, Inc. delivers stable operational momentum, with Q2 revenues up 7.9% and EPS up 28.6%. Learn more about JKHY stock here.
